title: EasyAFK
description: AFK without needing to leave your computer on. Just do /afk and boom.
body:
Ever need to afk at somewhere in minecraft but you don't want to deal with the hastle of leaving your computer on? Well with this mod you can stay in the game afk for up to 10 hours without having to deal with your computer staying online. All you need to do is bootup minecraft with this mod installed, make sure the server is <= 1.21.8 because thats all it supports currently, and do /afk. You will have to sign in online but then wait a moment (or try again) and a bot will automatically log on and replace you. Note: this isn't the most consistant mod so try /afk a couple of times before reporting a issue.

To report a error or issue or if you need help please feel free to email: asheraldis@gmail.com
